objective: Add local CPU diagnostics tool without regressing existing MCP surface contracts.

fallbackBehavior.onPartialParse: return text fallback with best-available structured values when possible
fallbackBehavior.onParseFailure: return safe text fallback and error code without crashing server

testObligations: unit parser tests for complete and partial CPU source text
unit handler tests for structured success and fallback output
contract test asserting tools/list descriptor and metadata
regression test asserting global tool surface now includes get_cpu_information
